pageContext.name: Tengen Uzui (Tengen Uzui Is Here!)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Bandai Spirits Ichibansho are proud to announce the newest release, Tengen Uzui (Tengen Uzui Is Here!) Collectible Figure!  This figure is expertly crafted and meticulously sculpted to look like Tengen Uzui from the respected anime, Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba. Standing at approximately 5.9' tall, Tengen Uzui is seen in his popular pose.  Be sure to collect this Tengen Uzui Collectible Figure and enhance your Demon Slayer display with other incredible Ichibansho figures!
